3122790.name: Augmented Fear
3122790.description:
Augmented Fear

You open your eyes, lying on the ground, your body soaked in a sticky liquid, your mind lost in confusion about what you are surrounded by the heat of flames and twisted metal.
A deserted city, strange and aggressive creatures, and secrets buried deep within.

Augmented Fear is a horror puzzle game set in a dark and oppressive cyberpunk world.

Key Features

  • Rooms, buildings, and objects are randomly generated with each playthrough.

  • Every monster has its own unique mechanics.

  • An immersive cyberpunk horror atmosphere.

  • Augmented reality changes the way you see the world.

  • No hand-holding, experiment to understand.

  • A tragic story hidden beneath the surface.

Play Your Way

Puzzle & Survival: Solve puzzles and find one of the three hidden exits while avoiding deadly creatures.
Horror: Adjust the intensity of jumpscares for a stressful or calm experience.
Narrative Exploration: Search for hidden clues and uncover the tragic story behind the environment.
Challenges: Beat your best times, face stronger creatures, and solve harder puzzles in story-driven challenges.

Gameplay

Puzzles: Find and combine items to solve intricate riddles that open your path to escape. Every detail matters.
Dynamic Environments: Rooms and objects within each building change location every playthrough for a fresh experience.
Augmented Reality: Use your AR headset to reveal hidden passages and solve puzzles invisible to the naked eye.
Dangerous Creatures: They might look cute, but they’re extremely aggressive. Each has its own behaviors and weaknesses, Study and adapt to survive.

Story

Search for hidden clues in buildings, on screens, within puzzles, even among the stars, to uncover a complex, emotional, and tragic narrative that reaches far beyond this forsaken city.

Developer’s Message

This game was created by a single passionate developer during spare time.
I truly hope you enjoy it.
